name: test-referral-program
description: Players invite others via referral codes; referrers earn rewards when referees reach a playtime threshold, with caps, VIP bonuses, and admin tools.

prizeIsCurrency.description: When true, the referrer reward is paid in currency. When false, a random configured item is awarded instead.

referrerCurrencyReward.description: Base currency reward for a successful referrer payout before VIP multiplier.

refereeCurrencyReward.description: Immediate currency welcome bonus paid to the referee when they link successfully.

items.description: Random item prize pool used when prizeIsCurrency is false.

playtimeThresholdMinutes.description: Minutes the referee must play after linking before the referrer is paid.

referralWindowHours.description: Maximum age in hours since a player's first connect on this game server to claim a referral.

maxReferralsPerDay.description: Maximum new referral links a referrer can receive per UTC day.

maxReferralsLifetime.description: Maximum lifetime referral links a referrer can receive.

permissions.description: Allows a player to use the refcode, referral, refstats, and reftop commands.
Count = VIP tier. Each tier adds +5% referrer reward, capped at +25%.
Allows admins to link or unlink referrals manually.

refcode.description: Show or generate your referral code.
refcode.helpText: Shows your personal referral code. Example for invited players: /referral <code> (replace / if your server uses a different command prefix).

referral.helpText: Usage: /referral <code> (replace / if your server uses a different command prefix). Links you to the player who invited you and claims your welcome bonus.

arguments.name: code
arguments.helpText: Referral code from the player who invited you

refstats.helpText: Shows your referral code, totals, pending referrals, earnings, and your own referrer if you have one.

reftop.helpText: Shows the top 10 players by verified paid referrals.

reflink.description: Admin: manually link a referee to a referrer and pay now or queue payout repair.
reflink.helpText: Usage: /reflink <referee> <referrer> (replace / if your server uses a different command prefix). Creates the referral link immediately and pays rewards right away when possible, otherwise leaves payout queued for retry.

refunlink.description: Admin: remove an existing referral link.
refunlink.helpText: Usage: /refunlink <referee> (replace / if your server uses a different command prefix). Removes a referral link and rolls back any recoverable rewards and stats.

on-player-disconnect.description: Checks whether the disconnecting player's referral has crossed the threshold and should be paid.

sweep-pending-referrals.description: Checks pending referral links and pays those whose referees reached the playtime threshold.

reset-daily-counters.description: Resets referral daily counters at UTC midnight.
